name: Chicken Saute with Oranges and Avocados
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken slightly to flatten into an even thickness.
2. Dredge lightly in flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat butter with oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add chicken (in batches if necessary) and saute on both sides until well browned.
5. Add orange juice, wine, mushrooms, parsley, orange peel, and rosemary; bring to simmer.
6. Let simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Transfer chicken to a heated serving platter using a slotted spoon.
8. Add vinegar to the skillet and continue simmering, scraping up any browned bits until the sauce is reduced by one-third.
9. Pour sauce over chicken; garnish with orange sections and avocado slices.
10. Serve immediately. Serve with a simple spinach salad, dessert, bread, and a dry Chenin Blanc.
